title: Butterfly — Simple Story (between-token insertion)
description: Meet-in-the-middle decoder under butterfly RoPE; speculative positioning across the seam.

title: Multithread-LM — generation (synth)
description: Mimic trace: parent prompt, <bot-K>, parallel <sot>s, lockstep sibling decode, laggard tail, <bos> committed at the wave's row end (postpone rule structural under the new layout).

title: Causal AR — simple_story (20 docs, real)
description: Real-corpus AR generation pack: 20 prompts decoded greedily under the standard causal model (ss_8k tokenizer, val_bpb=0.4769). Pair with compare_mt_allparallel_mirror for side-by-side AR vs multithread comparison on matched prompts.

title: Multithread-LM — all_parallel mirror_train (20 docs, real)
description: Real-corpus multithread generation pack: 20 prompts under mode=multithread, policy=mirror_train (causal layout mirrors training-time all_parallel waves). ss_8k_mt tokenizer, step=2240, val_bpb=0.4769. Per-doc K varies (1–7). Pair with compare_ar_simple for AR-vs-multithread comparison on the same prompts.

title: Causal AR — BOS-bestfit (simple_story, B=1 T=2048)
description: Single row at the real training T; multi-doc packing visible across the row.

title: Multithread-LM — dataloader, policy=pairs (real, B=2 T=1024)
description: Real-corpus multithread loader on simple_story, policy=pairs (K=2 waves chained). Two stacked views: (1) absolute row position with doc-idx tinting and BOS-bestfit packing; (2) by rope_idx — the actual 1D position fed into RoPE — with no doc segmentation, exposing the per-paragraph stride bands (anchors at paragraph_idx*256, cross-doc cursor stride-aligned). Paragraph-end target overrides (<|bot_K|>, <|eot|>, <|bos|>) and held decision-last positions visible in both views.

title: Multithread-LM — dataloader, policy=all_parallel (real, B=2 T=1024)
description: Sibling of the pairs dump above, policy=all_parallel: parent (K=1) followed by a single K=(N-1) wave per doc. Same two stacked views; the difference vs pairs is structural — one wide wave with K parallel <sot>s instead of a chain of K=2 waves. Stride bands and target overrides identical.

title: Butterfly — MIM masks (N=16)
description: Five variants: butterfly + naive/perdoc interleave × orig/seq coords. Doc boundaries marked.

title: Multithread-LM — staircase strip, policy=all_parallel (real, N=327)
description: Real-corpus all_parallel doc with K=4 wave (5 paragraphs). Block widths 1*75, 4*57, 3*1, 2*8, 1*5: parent K=1 (width-1 strip), then 57 lockstep K=4 steps, then the staircase descent (3→2→1) as non-decision threads retire. Compact rectangular strip only (N_q × max_W=4) — the lower-triangular bulk is uniformly visible by block_id[k] <= block_id[q] and is omitted.

title: Causal AR — RoPE schemes (plain / PI×2 / hidden-thinking)
description: Three positional schemes on a 10-token sequence. Hidden-thinking variant pins thinking-token k_pos to the parent so later queries see them as co-positioned.

title: Multithread-LM — RoPE (real, N=213)
description: Multithread paragraph-aligned RoPE (anchors at paragraph_idx*256) vs seq-position baseline. BOS at rope 0; sibling <sot>s at 256, 512; held decision-last at its thread's natural rope_idx, decoupled from row position.
